text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the passion she's now putting into her
training, it's like she's become a completely
different person.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her effort, I'm inspired to do whatever it
takes to help her reach the limits of her potential.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon is shocked by my behavior... At
the same time, she seems moved by my constant
enthusiasm.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A certain madness returns to her eyes as she
mutters, "It's too early to give up," before
suddenly withdrawing from the Gekkei Hai.
